case_title: JACKSON GROUP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VS. RAYMOND GASPARD et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON GROUP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-15-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT BLANK PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON GROUP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SERVED JUL-13-2011, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-22-2011. PLAINTIFF REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THE CASE SETTLED. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON GROUP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GASPARD, RAYMOND THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1000 HOWARD STREET, #205, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
